title: DAMAGE = OP LOOT
description:
Every time you take damage, chaos begins.
Instead of getting weaker…
you get stronger.
This mod rewards players with random overpowered loot whenever they take damage — complete with actionbar messages and particle explosions.
body:
**Every Damage Gives OP Items** is a chaotic and fun Minecraft gameplay mod where every time a player takes damage, they receive powerful and rare items.

This mod turns survival into a crazy challenge where getting hurt can actually make you stronger.

**🔥 Features**

Every time the player takes damage, a random OP item drops.

Works with different types of damage such as:
Fall damage
Mob attacks
Fire damage
Explosion damage
Projectile damage
Items spawn directly near the player.

**💎 Possible OP Items**

Players can receive powerful items such as:
Enchanted Golden Apples
Netherite Armor
Diamonds
Totems of Undying
Ender Pearls

**⚔️ Gameplay**

This mod creates a unique experience where players might intentionally take damage to receive powerful loot. It is perfect for challenge videos, chaotic survival worlds, or fun multiplayer gameplay.

**🎮 Use Cases**

Challenge runs
YouTube content
Multiplayer chaos
Hardcore survival twists
